title: Vue 2 viewer dropped — @vitejs/plugin-vue2 incompatible with TypeScript script setup
description: Vue 2 viewer (vue/2/viewer) could not be fixed. @vitejs/plugin-vue2 does not support TypeScript in <script setup lang="ts"> blocks without an additional TypeScript transform that is incompatible with the rest of the build chain. Vue 2 is dropped from safeframeworks. All vue/2 source files removed. ARCHITECTURE.md updated to document 7 supported frameworks.
acceptance: Vue 2 dropped and documented in ARCHITECTURE.md
resolution: Vue 2 dropped. @vitejs/plugin-vue2 does not support TypeScript in script setup blocks. 7 frameworks remain: React 18/19, Angular 21/22, Vue 3, Svelte 4/5.
